title: Ourcraft
description:
Pure Communism in the Minecraft Title-Screen.

w- wait... who said 'Mine' ?
body: Turns the '**Minecraft**' Title Image into '**Our****craft**' as a little communist joke.‎ ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤOURcraft* I hope this'll give you a little chuckle every time you see the Title-Screen. **In-game:** ![](https://files.catbox.moe/o596r4.png)
